NCT01302834.label: Outcome
NCT01302834.text: 399 patients assigned to receive cetuximab and 406 patients assigned to receive cisplatin were subsequently eligible.

NCT01874171.label: Outcome
NCT01874171.text: Overall (acute and late) severe (grade 3-5) toxicity did not differ significantly between treatment groups at 24 months (mean number of events per patient 4·8 [95% CI 4·2-5·4] with cisplatin vs 4·8 [4·2-5·4] with cetuximab; p=0·98).
